positive: A minimalist vector art print of a celestial owl perched on a crescent moon. The owl has stylized feather patterns in sapphire blue and emerald green. The moon glows with soft golden yellow light, and the background is a deep gradient of midnight blue and violet. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, with clean, bold lines, high contrast black outlines, and perfect silhouettes suitable for screen printing on apparel. Mid-century modern aesthetic, flat design, geometric patterns, isolated on a solid background.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, trademarks, multiple figures, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, photorealistic, bokeh, gradient background outside of specified color palette
